meta.notes: Upstream per-frame PNGs (489x461 canvas) were cropped to a fixed global union bounding rect across all animations and box-filter downscaled into 64x80 cells (see tools/build-newchar-sprites.cjs). The 'attack' strip reuses the pack's JumpFall pounce pose (no dedicated attack animation in the pack), the same reuse approach the Owl/Aegis packs used for a missing slot.
